seoTitle: Willangie vs Willatook — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Willangie and Willatook. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Willangie and Willatook.
heading: Willangie vs Willatook — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Willangie, Victoria and Willatook, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Willatook has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Willangie (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Willangie or Willatook safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Willangie has a flood risk score of 49/100, while Willatook scores 27/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Willangie scores 62/100 for bushfire risk. Willatook scores 54/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Willangie or Willatook?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Willatook has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.6% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
